---
id: update-mixtape
title: "Update mixtape"
description: "Updates an existing mixtape's metadata. Returns an HTML fragment with the updated mixtape."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update mixtape"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/vibes/mixtapes/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates an existing mixtape's metadata. Returns an HTML fragment with the updated mixtape.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
